name: Warm Green Bean and Walnut Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons walnuts, toasted lightly and chopped fine
3/4 pound green beans, trimmed and cut into 3/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a blender or mini-processor, puree 1 tablespoon of the walnuts with the vinegar, oil, and salt and pepper to taste.
2. Steam the green beans, covered, in a steamer set over boiling water for 5 to 8 minutes, or until they are crisp-tender. Transfer them to a bowl.
3. Toss the steamed beans with the dressing and the remaining chopped walnuts.
